description: Perform a Structured Data audit on https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Crawl at least 50 pages of the site, ensuring Structured Data (JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa) is extracted. Export the Structured Data findings and the standard Internal HTML report as CSV files to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Write a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/structured_data_audit.txt analyzing the findings, including the total number of pages crawled, the count of pages with vs. missing structured data, present Schema types, and implementation recommendations.
